name: talent-iq

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend

description: - 🧑‍💻 VSCode-Powered Code Editor - ⚙️ Secure Code Execution in an Isolated Environment - 🎯 Automatic Test Case Evaluation (Pass/Fail) - 🎉 Confetti Celebration on Successful Submissions - 🔔 Real-time Notifications for Failed Test Cases - 🧩 Dedicated Practice Problems Page for Solo Coding
